data.sql:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.10.15", "profile_name": "dbt_test_project", "target_name": "duckdb", "connection_name": "list_duckdb_raw_data"} */
select
      'duckdb' as database,
      table_name as name,
      table_schema as schema,
      CASE table_type
        WHEN 'BASE TABLE' THEN 'table'
        WHEN 'VIEW' THEN 'view'
        WHEN 'LOCAL TEMPORARY' THEN 'table'
        END as type
    from system.information_schema.tables
    where lower(table_schema) = 'raw_data'
    and lower(table_catalog) = 'duckdb'

/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.10.15", "profile_name": "dbt_test_project", "target_name": "duckdb", "node_id": "test.dbt_test_project.assert_no_future_dates"} */

    select
      count(*) as failures,
      count(*) != 0 as should_warn,
      count(*) != 0 as should_error
    from (
      
    
  -- Test that no order dates are in the future
select *
from "duckdb"."raw_data"."fact_orders"
where order_date > current_date()
  
  
      
    ) dbt_internal_test

data.sql:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.10.15", "profile_name": "dbt_test_project", "target_name": "duckdb", "node_id": "test.dbt_test_project.assert_positive_order_amounts"} */

    select
      count(*) as failures,
      count(*) != 0 as should_warn,
      count(*) != 0 as should_error
    from (
      
    
  -- Test that all completed orders have positive amounts
select *
from "duckdb"."raw_data"."fact_orders"
where status = 'completed'
  and order_amount <= 0
  
  
      
    ) dbt_internal_test
